auth.passwordRequirements: Minimum 8 characters, with at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter and one number
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we will send you a link to reset your password.
auth.forgotPasswordSuccess: If the email is registered, you will receive a link to reset your password in a few minutes.
auth.resetPasswordError: Invalid or expired link. Request a new reset.
auth.loginError: Could not sign in. Please try again.
auth.emailVerificationRequired: This context requires email confirmation. Check your inbox or resend the link.
auth.verifyEmailSubtitle: Enter your account email to receive the confirmation link again.
auth.verifyEmailFailedHint: This link could not confirm your email. You can request a new message below.
auth.verifyEmailSuccess: Email confirmed. You can sign in now.
auth.verifyEmailError: Could not confirm email. The link may have expired.
auth.verifyEmailResendGeneric: If there is a pending account, we sent instructions to the email provided.
auth.verifyEmailResendError: Could not send. Please try again.
auth.emailVerifiedSubtitle: Continue in the mobile app or on the web.

signup.pendingEmailVerification: We sent a confirmation email. Open the link to enable access before signing in.

users.errorDeletingUserDependencies: Cannot permanently delete: the user has dependencies that prevent deletion. Keep them inactive or remove dependencies.

contexts.configInvalidPositiveInt: Use an integer greater than or equal to 1.
contexts.configInvalidDomains: Domains must be a comma-separated list.

configKeyHelp.negative_report_dedup_window_min: Window in minutes to deduplicate consecutive "nothing happened" reports.
configKeyHelp.negative_block_if_positive_within_min: Blocks a new negative report if a positive report exists within this many minutes.
configKeyHelp.allowed_email_domains: Email domain suffixes allowed at signup. Empty = no restriction.
configKeyHelp.social_sso_enabled: Allow social login when the integration is available.
configKeyHelp.profile_require_gender: If true, gender is required for profile completeness (app / profile-status).
configKeyHelp.profile_require_country: If true, country is required for profile completeness.
configKeyHelp.profile_require_location: If true, location is required for profile completeness.
configKeyHelp.profile_require_external_identifier: If true, external identifier is required for profile completeness.
configKeyHelp.profile_require_phone: If true, phone is required for profile completeness.
configKeyHelp.require_email_verification: If true, users with an active participation in this context must confirm email before login and session refresh.
